commands.review_summary:
The PR stamps an owning sessionId onto lifecycle events, skips stale lifecycle persistence after sessions.reset row rotation, refreshes run context on legitimate compaction rotations, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +57. Total +109 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main resolves lifecycle persistence by sessionKey while sessions.reset rotates sessionId under that key. I did not run a live Slack reset race in this read-only review.
